mapper.select: SELECT A.POST_SN , A.BBS_SN , A.BBS_TYPE , A.TITLE , A.CONTENT , A.VIEW_CNT , A.CREAT_MBER_SN , (SELECT B.MBER_NM FROM MBER_INFO B WHERE A.CREAT_MBER_SN = B.MBER_SN) AS CREAT_MBER_NM , A.UDT_MBER_SN , (SELECT B.MBER_NM FROM MBER_INFO B WHERE A.UDT_MBER_SN = B.MBER_SN) AS UDT_MBER_NM , DATE_FORMAT(A.CREAT_DE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%I') AS CREAT_DATE , DATE_FORMAT(A.UDT_DE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%I') AS UDT_DATE FROM BBS_POST A WHERE A.BBS_SN = #{bbsSn} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.CREAT_DE DESC

SELECT A.POST_SN , A.BBS_SN , A.BBS_TYPE , A.TITLE , A.CONTENT , A.VIEW_CNT , A.CREAT_MBER_SN , (SELECT B.MBER_NM FROM MBER_INFO B WHERE A.CREAT_MBER_SN = B.MBER_SN) AS CREAT_MBER_NM , A.UDT_MBER_SN , (SELECT B.MBER_NM FROM MBER_INFO B WHERE A.UDT_MBER_SN = B.MBER_SN) AS UDT_MBER_NM , DATE_FORMAT(A.CREAT_DE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%I') AS CREAT_DATE , DATE_FORMAT(A.UDT_DE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%I') AS UDT_DATE FROM BBS_POST A WHERE A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.POST_SN = #{postSn}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BBS_POST (BBS_SN, BBS_TYPE, TITLE, CONTENT, CREAT_MBER_SN, UDT_MBER_SN) values (#{bbsSn}, #{bbsType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{creatMberSn}, #{udtMberSn});
mapper.delete: UPDATE BBS_POST SET USE_YN = 'N' , UDT_DE = SYSDATE() WHERE POST_SN = #{postSn}
